Records.description: Two-loop planar double-box $(3,1,3)$ Feynman graph studied as a subdivision of the sunset $(1,1,1)$ graph. 7 internal edges, 2 loops, 4 external legs at corners. Paper analyzes the motive of the associated second Symanzik hypersurface $X_{3,1,3}$ in $\mathbb{P}^6$ defined by the cubic polynomial $\Psi_{3,1,3}$. Main result: for generic masses the weight-5 graded piece of $H^5(X_{3,1,3},\mathbb{Q})$ is isomorphic to $H^1(E,\mathbb{Q}(-2))$ for an elliptic curve $E$, identifying the Feynman motive as elliptic. Does not compute the integral — only the underlying geometry.
Records.familyName: Fully massive two-loop 4-point planar double box (7 propagators)
